name: polish
description: Personal collection of curated, self-made agent skills.

interface.shortDescription: Curated personal skills for agent workflows
interface.longDescription: Polish is a personal collection of curated, self-made agent skills. It includes prompt-polish for rewriting rough questions into stronger bilingual LLM prompts, file-singlify for directory-first duplicate detection and read-only single-copy planning, and before-git-push for a final pre-push risk review that returns a PUSH or HOLD verdict.
defaultPrompt: Use prompt-polish to rewrite this prompt: ...
Rewrite this question for a better LLM answer.
Run before-git-push on my staged changes: PUSH or HOLD?
